title: 1981-04-16_Pat_186.txt
key_claims: Dick asserts that his withholding of taxes was not merely a "good" or culturally relative "moral" action, but a scientifically measurable engagement in reality testing. By verifying that the universe responds to Justice, he achieved empirical proof where others rely on faith.

He concludes that Injustice actually cannot exist—because Justice (Ma'at) is the ultimate foundation of reality. When mechanical/natural law (astral determinism) clashes with moral law (providence/Ma'at), the moral law overrides and suspends the natural.
In 3-74, Dick witnessed this exact event: the natural causal order of the Hologram was suspended and altered by providence to protect him as a direct consequence of his just act.

This transition from mechanical determinism to intentional providence is the ultimate return to the maternal: Ma'at is identified as the Great Mother (Ubik, Zebra, VALIS). Aligning with her brings you home to a safe, volitional cosmos.
recurring_concepts: **The Hologram Override**: The artificial, deterministic lower realm (the Black Iron Prison) is overridden by the upper volitional realm whenever true cosmic Justice is invoked.
reading_excerpt: Dick asserts that his withholding of taxes was not merely a "good" or culturally relative "moral" action, but a scientifically measurable engagement in reality testing. By verifying that the universe responds to Justice, he achieved empirical proof where others rely on faith.
